CVE-2022-1328.title: Buffer Overflow in uudecoder in Mutt affecting all versions start ...
CVE-2022-1328.description: Buffer Overflow in uudecoder in Mutt affecting all versions starting from 0.94.13 before 2.2.3 allows read past end of input line

CVE-2024-49393.title: In neomutt and mutt, the To and Cc email headers are not validate ...
CVE-2024-49393.description: In neomutt and mutt, the To and Cc email headers are not validated by cryptographic signing which allows an attacker that intercepts a message to change their value and include himself as a one of the recipients to compromise message confidentiality.

CVE-2024-49394.title: In mutt and neomutt the In-Reply-To email header field is not pro ...
CVE-2024-49394.description: In mutt and neomutt the In-Reply-To email header field is not protected by cryptographic signing which allows an attacker to reuse an unencrypted but signed email message to impersonate the original sender.
